name: Mouse
content: May 15th brings an opportunity for the Mouse to take the lead in a group project or family decision. Your sharp wit will be highly valued, so don't hesitate to voice your ideas. A small financial gain or unexpected gift may brighten your day.
advice: Trust your instincts and seize the moment to shine.

name: Cow
content: Patience and persistence are your allies today, Cow. Tackle tasks with your usual steady pace, and you'll find solutions to long-standing problems. A heartfelt conversation with a loved one could bring clarity and strengthen bonds.
advice: Focus on your goals, and don't let distractions deter you.

name: Tiger
content: Your adventurous spirit is calling, Tiger! This Friday is perfect for exploring new ideas or taking a calculated risk in your career. Be confident in your decisions, as your natural leadership will inspire others.
advice: Embrace new challenges; they hold the key to growth.

name: Rabbit
content: A day for peace and harmony, Rabbit. Focus on nurturing your relationships and creating a calm environment around you. Creative pursuits or a quiet evening at home will bring you the most satisfaction.
advice: Seek balance and prioritize your well-being today.

name: Dragon
content: The Dragon's charisma shines brightly on May 15th. This is an excellent day for networking, public speaking, or making a grand impression. Your ideas are potent, so share them with confidence.
advice: Don't be afraid to take center stage and lead with your vision.

name: Snake
content: Your intuition is particularly sharp today, Snake. Pay close attention to subtle signs and inner feelings, especially concerning financial matters or personal relationships. A moment of quiet reflection will reveal important truths.
advice: Trust your inner wisdom and observe before acting.

name: Horse
content: Energy and enthusiasm mark your day, Horse. Channel your vibrant spirit into productive activities or a social gathering. Spontaneity can lead to delightful experiences, but avoid impulsivity in important decisions.
advice: Embrace your freedom, but remember to ground yourself when needed.

name: Sheep
content: A gentle and comforting day awaits the Sheep. Focus on creative projects or spending quality time with loved ones. Your compassionate nature will be a source of comfort to others and bring you joy.
advice: Allow your artistic side to flourish and spread kindness.

name: Monkey
content: Your cleverness and adaptability are your greatest assets today, Monkey. A challenge at work or home can be swiftly overcome with your quick thinking. Don't be afraid to try unconventional solutions.
advice: Engage your mind and enjoy the thrill of problem-solving.

name: Rooster
content: The Rooster's diligent nature will be rewarded on May 15th. Attention to detail in your tasks will prevent future complications and earn you recognition. A practical approach will yield the best results.
advice: Stay organized and let your hard work speak for itself.

name: Dog
content: Loyalty and honesty are paramount for the Dog today. Strengthen your existing friendships and be a supportive presence for those around you. A walk in nature or some quiet contemplation will refresh your spirit.
advice: Cherish your connections and practice self-care.

name: Pig
content: A day of generosity and enjoyment awaits the Pig. Share your good fortune with others, and you'll find even greater happiness. Indulge in a small luxury or a delicious meal to celebrate your efforts.
advice: Spread joy and allow yourself to savor life's simple pleasures.
